## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any issue: "Closes #123". -->

## How I verified
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated a test for the change (this repo is test-first)
- [ ] Ran the CLI by hand on a real input (paste the command + output if relevant)

## Checklist
- [ ] Scope is one thing (no drive-by refactors)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (this tool is zero-dependency by design)
- [ ] README / `--help` updated if behavior or flags changed
- [ ] If this touches what the tool detects/masks/runs, I did **not** weaken the
      load-bearing safety disclaimer or overclaim what it guarantees
